name: Clary Courts
description: Longview Pickleball club plays here every Monday/Wednesday/Friday .  People show up early as 7 and many are here by 9 and stay until they decide to stop

name: Columbia Heights Elementary
description: Columbia Heights Elementary is one of the most popular places to play pickleball in Longview, WA. There are 2 indoor wood courts. The lines are permanent, and portable nets are available. Players have access to restrooms.

name: Mint Valley Racquet & Fitness Club
description: Mint Valley Racquet & Fitness Club is a place to play pickleball in Longview, WA. There are 4 indoor acrylic courts. The lines are permanent, and portable nets are available. You can reserve the courts. A membership is required to play. Amenities include lights, a pro shop or equipment store, locker rooms, restrooms, trainers or lessons, and food.
fees: Members only — $11 per hour or $12 11am-2pm Monday-Friday

name: Vandercook Park
description: Vandercook Park is a place to play pickleball in Longview, WA. There are 4 outdoor courts. The lines are permanent, but you'll need to bring your own net. The courts are free.

name: YMCA of Southwest Washington
description: Come play pickleball at YMCA of Southwest Washington in Longview, WA! There are 4 indoor courts. The lines are permanent, but you'll need to bring your own net. Reservations are available. The facility includes amenities like lights. A membership is required to play.

name: Youth and Family Link
description: Youth and Family Link is one of the most popular places to play pickleball in Longview, WA. There are 4 indoor wood courts. The lines are permanent, but you'll need to bring your own net. Amenities include restrooms, water, and lights. A one-time fee is required to play. The courts can be reserved.
